safety_note: Public data only. No real funding partner names, private routing logic, affiliate links, apply links, private compensation data, private access details, borrower PII, or private review notes.
description: Registry for public-safe future downloadable assets and gated resources.

lead_magnets.title: Funding Readiness Checklist
lead_magnets.summary: A simple checklist for business setup, bank activity, documents, and funding purpose clarity.
lead_magnets.safe_promise: Helps users prepare a cleaner file for review.

lead_magnets.title: Bank Statement Prep Guide
lead_magnets.summary: Explains how bank activity may affect funding-readiness review and how to organize statements.
lead_magnets.safe_promise: Helps users understand bank activity signals before review.

lead_magnets.title: Broker Intake Scorecard Pack
lead_magnets.summary: A broker-facing intake flow, document checklist, and result language guide.
lead_magnets.safe_promise: Helps brokers triage leads and reduce intake chaos.

lead_magnets.title: Partner Embed Starter Kit
lead_magnets.summary: A public-safe guide for embedding the scorecard on partner pages.
lead_magnets.safe_promise: Helps partners add a readiness tool without exposing private routing.

lead_magnets.title: Funding Path Comparison Sheet
lead_magnets.summary: A worksheet for comparing possible funding families by use case, document needs, and readiness signals.
lead_magnets.safe_promise: Helps users compare general paths before requesting review.
